infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to capture survey site photographs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is used to upload site images for surveys.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to record GPS coordinates of the survey site.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow GP Survey to access your photos for site documentation.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow GP Survey to use the camera to capture site photographs.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow GP Survey to access location for GPS coordinate capture.
